testcase.name: ReviewExperimentModal Estimated days Triggers on first render
ReviewExperimentModal Estimated days Triggers on confidence level change
ReviewExperimentModal Estimated days Triggers on every split level change
ReviewExperimentModal Estimated days Informs user about an error
ReviewExperimentModal Estimated days Informs user about estimation
Segments Experiments with Click Goal Experiment renders when goal value is click
Segments Experiments with Click Goal User clicks in set element button, the button turns from default to active mode
Segments Experiments with Click Goal The user can set a click target element in a draft experiment
Segments Experiments with Click Goal The user can edit a selected click target element in a draft experiment
Segments Experiments with Click Goal When the user set element as click target, then the element is set as the click target and the id of the element as a link
Segments Experiments with Click Goal All clickable elements highlighted when the user clicks on set element button
Segments Experiments with Click Goal A tooltip click element to set as click target for your goal appears when the user clicks on set element button
Segments Experiments with Click Goal Selectable as target elements show tooltips on hover
Segments Experiments with Click Goal Cancel selection click target element proccess when clicking out of selection zone
Segments Experiments with Click Goal When hovering over to invalid click target elements, the mouse is displayed in not-allowed mode
Segments Experiments with Click Goal The user can remove a selected click target in a draft element
Segments Experiments with Click Goal The user clicks in the UI reference to the selected click target element, the page scrolls to make it visible
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Renders info message ab testing panel only available for content pages
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Renders ab testing panel with experience selected and zero experiments
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Renders ab testing panel with experience selected and an experiment
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Renders modal to create experiment when the user clicks on create test button
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Renders experiment status label
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Renders experiment without actions when it's not editable
SegmentsExperimentsSidebar Sidebar indicates mandatory sections in sidebar with asterisks icons
Variants Renders no variants message
Variants Renders variant list
Variants Create variant button
Variants Renders variants without create variant button when it's not editable
Review and Run test Can view review experiment modal
Review and Run test Error messages appears when the user clicks in review and run and there is no click target element selected
Review and Run test Error messages appears when the user clicks in review and run and there is only the control variant created
Review and Run test Can run test that won't be editable
Review and Run test Variants cannot be edited/deleted/added in a running experiment
Experiment History Tab Experiment is archived after terminating it
Experiment History Tab Experiment is archive after completing it
Experiment History Tab Experiments have name, description and status label
No Winner Declared Experiment has basic no winner declared elements
No Winner Declared Variant publish action button when confirming in no winner declared status
No Winner Declared Variant publish action button when not confirming in no winner declared status
Winner declared Experiment has basic winner declared elements
Winner declared Variant publish winner action button in alert in winner declared status
Winner declared Variant publish action button when confirming in winner declared status
Winner declared Variant publish action button when not confirming in winner declared status
Winner declared Discard button action
